title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.130 - Boards to regulate admission of students
text:
174.130.  Boards to regulate admission of students. — Each board may make such rules and regulations for the admission of students as may be deemed proper.
(RSMo 1939 § 10762) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9605; 1919 § 11500; 1909 § 11076
